title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph, Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model, PostgreSQL for memory, and APIs for real-time flight and hotel data. The system coordinates four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and final responses.
